listOfQuestions.question: In Cell Biology, what does "Cell membrane" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A boundary that controls movement into and out of the cell
wrongAnswers: The organelle that stores most genetic material in eukaryotic cells
An organelle that breaks down waste and worn cell parts
Movement of particles from higher concentration to lower concentration

listOfQuestions.question: In Cell Biology, what does "Cytoplasm" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: The gel-like material inside a cell where many reactions occur
wrongAnswers: An organelle that releases usable energy from food molecules
A plant cell organelle that carries out photosynthesis
Diffusion of water across a selectively permeable membrane

listOfQuestions.question: In Cell Biology, what does "Nucleus" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: The organelle that stores most genetic material in eukaryotic cells
wrongAnswers: A structure that builds proteins from amino acids
A rigid outer layer that supports some kinds of cells
Movement across a membrane using cellular energy

listOfQuestions.question: In Cell Biology, what does "Mitochondrion" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: An organelle that releases usable energy from food molecules
wrongAnswers: A membrane network involved in protein and lipid processing
A storage compartment inside a cell
A protein that speeds up a chemical reaction

listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A structure that builds proteins from amino acids
wrongAnswers: An organelle that modifies and packages cell products
A specialized structure inside a cell
A molecule used as a direct energy source in cells

wrongAnswers: An organelle that breaks down waste and worn cell parts
